questions.question: Самое фундаментальное изменение в 3.x — AIP-72 Task SDK. Что это и почему important?

options.text: Tasks communicate с Airflow через REST API, НЕ direct SQLAlchemy session к metadata DB. Security (malicious DAG не может drop tables), future-proof (DB schema can change без breaking workers), multi-team isolation. Workers больше не имеют direct DB access — все через API server

questions.explanation: AIP-72 Task SDK — biggest architectural change в 3.x. В 2.x workers имеют direct SQLAlchemy session — security risk (malicious code может query/modify arbitrary tables). В 3.x — Task SDK = REST API client. Worker calls API server для Variable.get, Connection.get, XCom push/pull. Benefits: security boundary, multi-team isolation, future-proof DB schema. Migration: imports rename `airflow.decorators` → `airflow.sdk` через ruff AIR301. Most user code minimal changes.

questions.question: Какие 3.x changes требуют manual rewrite (не auto-fix)?

options.text: Manual: SubDAG → TaskGroup (rare), FAB hooks в webserver_config.py → auth provider (если custom auth), SLA parameter → Listener API monitoring, custom Flask plugins → FastAPI/React. Auto-fixable: imports (ruff AIR301), execution_date → logical_date (AIR302), schedule_interval → schedule

questions.explanation: Migration breakdown: ~80% changes auto-fixable через ruff (imports, parameter renames, deprecated API calls). Manual rewrites: (1) SubDAG → TaskGroup (rare в modern codebase); (2) FAB custom auth — use apache-airflow-providers-fab для compat или rewrite через AuthManager; (3) SLA — removed в 3.x (AIP-89), replace через Listener API duration monitoring; (4) Custom Flask views → FastAPI + React (если есть). Most production codebases — 1-2 weeks effort для migration code changes.

questions.question: DAG Versioning (AIP-63) и DAG Bundles (AIP-66) — что они дают?

options.text: DAG Versioning: history DAG в DB, UI shows old run vs old version (audit, debugging). DAG Bundles: pluggable DAG sources (Git/S3/HTTP) с per-bundle versioning, refresh intervals. Replaces gitSync sidecar — multi-source, no per-pod overhead

questions.explanation: AIP-63 DAG Versioning — каждое DAG mod creates new version в DB. UI can show old run against old DAG (debugging crucial), compare versions, rollback. Storage cost. AIP-66 DAG Bundles — pluggable abstraction для DAG sources. Multiple bundles (production-git + experimental-s3 + dev-http) one Airflow instance, per-bundle refresh, per-bundle versioning. Replaces gitSync sidecar (модуль 15.03) — no per-pod overhead, multi-source. Both новые features 3.x — not breaking, additive.

questions.question: В 2026 большинство production deployments на 2.10/2.11 LTS и могут отложить migration к 3.x до 2027.
questions.explanation: 2.11 LTS support до ~Q3 2027 — security fixes и patches. 2026 — большинство production остаётся на 2.x. 3.0 released early 2025, 3.1 late 2025 (HITL), 3.2 mid 2026 (Multi-Team) — ecosystem всё ещё maturing. Reasonable migration window: Q1-Q2 2027 когда 3.2+ stable, ecosystem (providers, tools) caught up, но time before 2.11 EOL. Spешка не нужна — major version upgrade — strategic planning event, не reactive.
